product_overview: QuillHaven is an AI-powered writing platform tailored for long-form, chapter-based storytelling, delivering superior context retention, project organization, and specialized creative writing features for novelists and authors.
core_goals: Establish market leadership in AI-assisted long-form writing tools
Achieve over 70% user retention within 90 days by superior context management
Build sustainable revenue through freemium model with 15-20% conversion to paid plans
Foster an active writing community centered on long-form storytelling
key_features: AI Writing Engine capable of generating coherent chapters of 1,000-5,000 words with full context awareness across unlimited chapters
Project management system with metadata, chapter reordering, version control, progress tracking, and export functionality
Context management system including character database, plot thread monitoring, world-building consistency, and timeline tracking
User account management with secure email registration, profile and preferences, GDPR and CCPA compliance, and encrypted content storage
Basic editing interface featuring distraction-free writing environment, chapter navigation, search and replace, grammar checking, and real-time word count
Authentication backend using JWT for secure registration, login, password reset, and session management
Frontend components supporting authentication and project interaction with React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS
Reusable UI components built with Radix UI and styled by Tailwind CSS
Testing infrastructure with unit and integration tests for core services and components
user_flow_summary: New user onboarding from landing page through registration, welcome flow, first project creation, and first chapter generation with tutorial
Chapter creation workflow: project selection, context review, chapter setup, AI generation, editing and iterative refinement, progress saving
Context management including creation and tracking of characters, plots, world-building elements, timeline management, and integration with AI generation
Authentication flow encompassing registration, login, password recovery, and session management
Project management including project creation, editing, settings adjustment, and export
validation_criteria: AI-generated chapters maintain narrative coherence and completeness within 60 seconds per chapter
Users can create unlimited projects, reorder chapters by drag-and-drop, and access version history for at least 30 days
Character and plot context is automatically referenced and consistent during AI generation
Account creation completes within 2 minutes; password reset and export functionalities fully operational
All pages load within 3 seconds; editor features auto-save every 30 seconds; grammar checks identify common errors
Security requirements met including AES-256 encryption, GDPR/CCPA compliance, and secure session management
Support for minimum 1000 concurrent users with 99.5% uptime
Successful export in multiple formats including DOCX, PDF, TXT, EPUB with completion within 30 seconds
User satisfaction rating of 80%+ for AI-generated content and success metrics including 70% retention at 90 days

features.name: Project Foundation
features.description: Next.js 15 project setup with TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, ESLint, Prettier, and Husky for code quality

features.name: Database Schema
features.description: Complete Prisma schema with PostgreSQL for users, projects, chapters, characters, and context management

features.name: Authentication Backend
features.description: JWT-based authentication system with user registration, login, password reset, and session management

features.name: Authentication Frontend
features.description: React components for user authentication including login, register, password reset, and auth context

features.name: Project Management Backend
features.description: CRUD API endpoints for writing projects with pagination, filtering, and authorization

features.name: Project Management Frontend
features.description: React components for project dashboard, creation wizard, settings, and project cards

features.name: UI Components
features.description: Reusable UI components built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS

features.name: Utilities and Helpers
features.description: Utility functions, constants, validation schemas, and helper functions

features.name: Health Check
features.description: System health monitoring endpoint for application status

features.name: Testing Infrastructure
features.description: Unit tests for authentication and project management components and services
